confidence_threshold.description: Confidence threshold percentage (0-100) for reporting issues. Lower = more issues reported.

severity_override.description: Override default severity for specific check types

disabled_checks.description: List of check categories to completely disable

custom_patterns.description: Custom regex patterns to check with associated messages

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern to match against code

message.description: Message to display when pattern is matched

severity.description: Severity level for this custom pattern

max_issues_per_file.description: Maximum number of issues to report per file (prevents overwhelming reports)

excluded_paths.description: File paths or glob patterns to exclude from review

specialists.description: Control which specialist agents run during review

enabled.description: List of specialist IDs to enable. When specified, only these specialists will run. Default: all specialists.

disabled.description: List of specialist IDs to disable. These specialists will be skipped during review.

extensions.description: Control framework extension loading for specialist agents

auto_detect.description: Automatically detect frameworks from project config and load matching extensions

enabled.description: List of extension IDs to explicitly enable, in addition to auto-detected ones

disabled.description: List of extension IDs to disable, even if auto-detected

ticket.description: Configure ticket context integration for reviews

enabled.description: Enable ticket context gathering during review

prompt_when_missing.description: Prompt the user for ticket information when not found in branch name or PR

jira_project_key.description: Jira project key to use for ticket lookups (e.g. 'PROJ'). When null, attempts to detect from branch name.
